application.name: One Quiet Mark
application.targetHuman: A person who wants one private, non-competitive acknowledgement that they returned today.
application.coreAction: Hold one quiet mark for a full breath and release it to record today's return.

constraints: Only uninterrupted active holding counts toward completion.
Do not display a competitive timer or public streak.

feedback.onProgress: Let the mark become present without scores or copy competing with the action.
feedback.onCompletion: Acknowledge one private return with a quiet local change.
feedback.onInterruption: End the partial hold gently without pretending it was completed.

runtime.returnInvitation: Invite another return on the next local day without penalizing missed days.

accumulated.description: Completed returns form a sparse private trace rather than a performance streak.

forbiddenPatterns: profile or login before first value
visualDirection: warm low-contrast field with accessible text
continuity shown as a sparse trace rather than charts
implementationNotes: Replace the illustrative identity suite with an explicitly selected and tested versioned suite before production.
Derive projections from immutable events; never make a projection the canonical record.

operatorNotes: Replace every illustrative application identifier and policy before production.
No remote service is justified by this template ritual.
